race.description: St Albies Alumni Vince Hamilton Lives On Handicap (C2)
race.comment: ICHIKA (4) bounced off her good second two-back, with a fast finishing victory over 1400m at Tamworth from back in the field. Looks to have further upside heading into this and finds a suitable race to keep the momentum going. GELSEY (1) strengthened over the break and has finished in the money at all four starts this time in. Closed strongly with a narrow second over 1200m at Muswellbrook. Ready for the trip in this easier contest. YACHT GIRL (5) improving mare with her hoof on the till. Took good ground off the progressive Olympian with a solid second over 1400m at Scone. On the quick back-up and expected to go close. WOLFCRAIG (3) racing well. Worked hard from the awkward gate with a game on-pace third over 1400m here in C1 class. Maps well and looks up to the test.  EN PRIMEUR (8) gone to a new level this campaign and not without each way prospects.
